category.name: Preventive health checks

requisites.value: There are no particular preparations for a diagnostic X-ray scan. In some cases, you may need to take a contrast material or “contrast dye” before your X-ray. This is a substance that will help improve the quality of the images.

category.markdown:
a series of medical tests and evaluations that help identify potential health issues early
